headline: Prediction Markets Step Up Lobbying to Fight Stricter Rules
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Prediction markets are pouring money into Washington to defend against escalating criticism that their fast-growing platforms are contributing to a gambling explosion and enabling insider trading.
